title: Senior Frontend Developer at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd:
HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd!
